site.name: Tianci's Toolbox
site.title: Tianci's Toolbox
site.description: A personal space for writing, projects, resources, and long-term experiments.
site.tagline: Writing, projects, and a few things in progress.

titleLines: Writing about code, projects, resources, and long-term practice
home.intro: This is my personal site for publishing essays, collecting projects, organizing resources and small tools, and sharing ideas that are still taking shape.
home.latestDescription: Recently published posts will appear here.

about.intro: I want this site to become a long-running public workbench: the blog holds thinking, the works page shows projects, and the resources page collects materials worth revisiting.
focus: Design screenshots, inspiration, and process notes
about.contactText: If you want to talk collaboration, exchange technical ideas, or simply say hello, you can reach me by email or GitHub.

works.metadataDescription: Projects, case studies, and long-running works with screenshots, tech stacks, and related links.
works.title: Works
works.intro: A collection of projects, products, and experiments I have built. Open an item to see the overview, screenshots, tech stack, and related links.

archive.metadataDescription: Blog posts and update history organized by time.
archive.title: Archive
archive.description: All blog posts are collected here in reverse chronological order.
archive.stats: I wrote {count} posts this year, totaling {words} words
archive.empty: No posts in this category yet

toolsHub.metadataTitle: Online Toolkit: llms.txt Generator, Code Minifier, AES, Base64, MD5, JSON, QR Code
toolsHub.metadataDescription: A free online toolkit covering llms.txt generation, code minification and obfuscation, AES encryption, Base64, MD5, random strings, timestamps, JSON formatting, QR codes, image utilities, network checks, metadata extraction, Minecraft, GitHub, Gravatar, IP lookup, Bing wallpaper, and more.
toolsHub.title: Tools Menu
toolsHub.description: A free toolbox for text and encoding, image processing, SEO / GEO, network checks, calculators, Chinese utilities, and dewatermarking. Most tools run locally in your browser.
toolsHub.featuredDescription: Parse WeChat Official Account, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and Kuaishou share links to retrieve clean image and video resources.

privacy.metadataDescription: A short note about how this site handles visit data and contact information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
sections: This is a personal site for publishing posts, showing works, and organizing resources. It does not actively collect sensitive identity-related information or sell your data to third parties.

Like most websites, the server may record basic visit data such as access time, request path, browser type, and IP address. This is used only for troubleshooting, understanding traffic, and improving the experience.
To remember interface preferences such as theme, layout, language, and sidebar state, the site stores a small amount of configuration locally in your browser. These values stay on your device.
Some pages may use third-party resources such as images, fonts, repository data, or external link previews. Those providers may process request data according to their own privacy policies.
privacy.contactText: If you contact me by email, I will use that information only to reply or continue the conversation. It will not be used for marketing or disclosed to third parties.

pricing.metadataDescription: Contact me about project collaboration, website building, or content customization.
pricing.title: Collaboration
pricing.description: If you want to discuss website building, project development, design support, or content collaboration, feel free to contact me. I will reply as soon as possible and help clarify the scope and plan.
pricing.sectionText: Email is the preferred channel for now. Share your project background, goals, and rough timeline, and I will suggest a feasible plan and pricing direction.

local-tools.title: Local Tools

image-tools.title: Image Tools
image-tools.description: Online image tools for QR codes, format conversion, compression, cropping, watermarks, favicons, and dominant color extraction.

network-tools.title: Network Basics
network-tools.description: Network utilities for DNS lookup, ping, port scanning, URL status, webpage metadata, image extraction, and web-to-Markdown conversion.

public-data-tools.title: Public Data
public-data-tools.description: Useful lookups for Minecraft, GitHub repositories, Gravatar, IP and mobile number location, Bing daily wallpaper, and more.

seo-geo-tools.title: SEO | GEO Tools
seo-geo-tools.description: Optimization tools for search engines and generative AI: llms.txt, meta tags, robots.txt, JSON-LD, and keyword density analysis.

calc-tools.description: Practical calculators for mortgage, income tax, BMI, date difference, and common unit conversion.

cn-tools.title: Chinese Tools
cn-tools.description: Utilities for Chinese scenarios: simplified/traditional conversion, Chinese-to-pinyin, and Chinese fake data generation.

css-tools.title: Frontend / CSS
css-tools.description: Visual generators for CSS gradients, box-shadow, border radius, and color palettes with copy-ready code.

toolTitles.content-tools: Book of Answers / Poetry / Today in History

footerNote.before: Most tools here run locally in your browser and do not upload your content; the few that require network access only read public information. For security reasons, network tools do not support querying
footerNote.after: and other intranet addresses. Feel free to bookmark this page to keep these utilities handy.

word-count.title: Word Count
word-count.description: Count characters, words, punctuation, lines, and paragraphs in real time.

rmb-capital.title: RMB Uppercase
rmb-capital.description: Convert numeric amounts into formal Chinese RMB uppercase text.

regex-tester.title: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test regular expressions with common flags and preview matches instantly.

color-tool.title: Color Tool / Gradient
color-tool.description: Convert HEX, RGB, and HSL, check contrast, and generate CSS gradients.

data-convert.title: JSON <-> CSV
data-convert.description: Convert JSON arrays and CSV tables for import, export, and data cleanup.

jwt-decode.title: JWT Decode
jwt-decode.description: Decode JWT headers and payloads, with issued and expiry times shown clearly.

cron.title: Cron Parser
cron.description: Parse standard five-field cron expressions and preview upcoming runs.

sha-hash.title: SHA Hash
sha-hash.description: Compute SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 locally with Web Crypto.

base-convert.description: Convert binary, octal, decimal, hex, and bases from 2 to 36 using BigInt.

text-diff.description: Compare two text blocks line by line and highlight added or removed lines.

case-convert.description: Convert between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, and Title Case.

image-convert.description: Convert PNG, JPG, and WebP locally with adjustable output quality.

image-resize.description: Resize images to exact dimensions, optionally locking the aspect ratio.

image-watermark.description: Add text watermarks with size, color, opacity, position, or tiled layout.

color-extract.title: Dominant Color Extractor
color-extract.description: Extract dominant colors from an image and copy palette values.

qrcode.title: QR Code Generator

image-base64.title: Image / Base64
image-base64.description: Convert images to Data URLs, or paste Base64 to preview and validate.

content-tools.title: Book of Answers / Poetry / Today in History
